name: InterviewPro
desc: AI-Powered Interview Prep Platform** Prepare smarter with AI-driven mock interviews! Get real-time transcription, feedback, and confidence-building tools. Built using Next.js, Tailwind CSS, Node.js, and NLP APIs, it's perfect for all skill levels.

name: Disease Prediction System
desc: About This project builds a web app that uses machine learning to predict diseases based on user input, potentially helping them decide if they need to see a doctor.

name: Organ Donation System | DonarPlus
desc: The Organ Donation System is a decentralized web app connecting organ donors and recipients, ensuring secure and efficient donations.

name: photographer portfolio
desc: The site features a responsive design, image gallery, service details, and contact form, all built with HTML5, CSS3, and JavaScript for easy customization.

name: GYMLandingPage
desc: This is a simple web page designed using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript to create an attractive landing page for a gym or fitness center.
